comment: SHA-256 (truncated to 16 hex chars) of buildPrompt() rendered against SUMMARY_SENTINEL_ARGS in synthesize-summary-prompt.ts. Run npm test (lib/agents/__tests__/synthesize-summary.test.ts) — it asserts the live hash equals this. v3 (post-M8 follow-up): expanded the banned-phrases list with meta-commentary about LLM/parser response counts ('X of N judges', 'partial picture', 'directional not definitive') and removed n_llms_responding / n_parsers_responding from the prompt's input section so the model can't see and reference those counts. Cache namespace bumped apeds_summary:v2 → v3 in lockstep. When you intentionally change the prompt, regenerate via the failing test message and bump the cache namespace (apeds_summary:vN → vN+1) in synthesize-summary.ts so stale completions don't get returned.
